verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Why complain about your clothes and your shoes Why complain about your teacher and her rules Why complain when there so many with no home Why complain when you have one for your own.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Just be thankful for the good things that you’ve got x 2 The good things that you’ve got are for many a dream Just be thankful for the good things t hat you’ve got. Why complain about the way that you look

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Why complain about the scolding that you took Why complain when so many cannot run Why complain when you are having so much fun.
